goal: Implement or design explicit duplicate occurrence selection without auto-resolution.
whatWasImplemented: Recorded manual occurrence selection as the only acceptable future resolution model.
Kept duplicate-conflict settings blocked in the active safe-batch path.
Added deterministic tests that assert duplicate blocked copy remains active.
whatWasNotImplemented: No automatic duplicate choice was added.
No production duplicate write path was enabled.
No real config duplicate cleanup was attempted.
blockers: Needs target occurrence data structure that carries file path, line number, raw line, and value.
Needs UI confirmation for the selected occurrence before any write is possible.
nextRecommendedWork: Create read-only duplicate occurrence selector and fixture tests for same-file and source-layer duplicates.
